comparison.note: Same input produces different actions: cautious sniffs around (hesitant), greedy and explorer both go right but for different reasons (scent vs exploration)

description: Expected outputs for maze-rat scenario with input: scent_strength=7, dead_ends_nearby=2, hunger_level=4

cautious.explanation: scent_strength >= 7 AND dead_ends_nearby < 2 is false (dead_ends=2), so r3 does not match. scent_strength >= 4 matches r4.

explorer.explanation: dead_ends_nearby <= 2 matches r2 (explorer prefers going right when few dead ends).

greedy.explanation: scent_strength >= 7 matches r1 immediately (greedy always follows strong scent).
